mapper.sql: id, source_id, target_id, relation_type, description, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_knowledge_relation (source_id, target_id, relation_type, description, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted) VALUES (#{sourceId}, #{targetId}, #{relationType}, #{description}, #{sort}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_knowledge_relation SET source_id = #{sourceId}, target_id = #{targetId}, relation_type = #{relationType}, description = #{description}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_knowledge_relation SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_knowledge_relation SET deleted = 1 WHERE source_id = #{knowledgeId} OR target_id = #{knowledgeId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_knowledge_relation WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_knowledge_relation WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM edu_knowledge_relation WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM edu_knowledge_relation WHERE (source_id = #{knowledgeId} OR target_id = #{knowledgeId}) AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM edu_knowledge_relation WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_knowledge_relation WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_knowledge_relation WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND relation_type = #{relationType} AND deleted = 0
